# Team handoff template

## Current owner

- Name: `[name]`
- Area: `[core training | dataset analysis | demo | report]`
- Date: `[YYYY-MM-DD]`

## Current state

- Branch or folder: `[location]`
- Last command run:
  ```bash
  [command]
  ```
- Result: `[key output]`

## Inputs needed

- Dataset path: `[path]`
- Checkpoint path: `[path]`
- Metrics path: `[path]`
- Figures path: `[path]`

## Outputs produced

- Files changed: `[files]`
- Generated artifacts: `[paths]`
- Evidence: `[commands and results]`

## Known gaps

- Gap: `[what does not work yet]`
- Evidence: `[what proves the gap]`
- Next action: `[specific command or file edit]`
